traitorous_eight.story: The "Traitorous Eight" left Shockley Semiconductor to found Fairchild, effectively birthing Silicon Valley.

moores_law.story: Gordon Moore predicted that the number of transistors on a microchip would double every two years (Moore's Law).

ai_winter.story: The "AI Winter" period saw reduced funding and interest in artificial intelligence research due to overhyped expectations.

apple_1984_commercial.story: Apple aired the iconic "1984" commercial during the Super Bowl to introduce the Macintosh.

browser_wars.story: The "Browser Wars" raged between Netscape Navigator and Microsoft Internet Explorer for market dominance.

deep_blue_kasparov.story: IBM's Deep Blue supercomputer defeated world chess champion Garry Kasparov, a milestone for AI.

us_v_microsoft.story: United States v. Microsoft Corp. ruled that Microsoft abused its monopoly power on Intel-based PCs.

dotcom_bubble.story: The Dot-com Bubble burst, causing a massive stock market crash and the collapse of many internet startups.

iphone_unveil.story: Steve Jobs unveiled the iPhone, combining a widescreen iPod, a revolutionary mobile phone, and a breakthrough internet communicator.

bitcoin_genesis.story: Satoshi Nakamoto mined the Genesis Block of Bitcoin amidst the global financial crisis.

apple_samsung_lawsuit.story: Apple and Samsung engaged in a series of high-profile patent lawsuits across multiple countries regarding smartphone designs.

snowden_leaks.story: Edward Snowden's leaks prompted tech giants to accelerate the adoption of end-to-end encryption and SSL/TLS.

alphago_lee_sedol.story: AlphaGo defeated 18-time world champion Lee Sedol in Seoul, demonstrating the power of deep reinforcement learning.

cambridge_analytica.story: The Cambridge Analytica scandal revealed massive data privacy breaches, leading to increased scrutiny on social media platforms.

chip_shortage.story: A global semiconductor shortage disrupted industries from automotive to consumer electronics, highlighting supply chain fragility.

ethereum_merge.story: Ethereum completed "The Merge," transitioning from Proof-of-Work to Proof-of-Stake, reducing energy consumption by 99.9%.

chatgpt_launch.story: OpenAI released ChatGPT, triggering a global generative AI arms race among big tech companies.

altman_firing.story: Sam Altman was abruptly fired and then reinstated as CEO of OpenAI after intense pressure from employees and Microsoft.

nvidia_trillion.story: Driven by the AI boom and H100 demand, NVIDIA joined the club of companies with a market cap over $1 trillion.

fugaku_covid.story: Fugaku was used for COVID-19 droplet analysis simulations

sequoia_whatsapp.story: Sequoia Capital was the sole investor in WhatsApp ($60M total)

yc_justintv.story: Y Combinator funded Justin.tv which became Twitch

thiel_palantir.story: Peter Thiel co-founded Palantir after PayPal
